abilities.name: Ghost of Malifaux
abilities.text: When a model with an attached Injustice upgrade is killed within 8" this model may attach an Injustice upgrade to a different enemy model within 4" of the killed model.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (warding) abilities of other models.

abilities.name: Undying
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by enemy models with attached Injustice upgrades by 2.

actions.name: Head in the Noose
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4" toward this model.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Bound
triggers.text: The target gains an Aura (Binding) token.

actions.name: Dead Man's Collar
actions.effects: Target gains an Injustice upgrade. If this action receives a raise, the target gains an Aura (Binding) token.

triggers.name: Advance
triggers.text: Move this model 4" toward the target.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (t). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Drawn to Betrayal
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Move the target up to 6" toward an ally or a model with an Injustice upgrade in its LoS.

triggers.name: Denial
triggers.text: Enemy models within (r)2" of the target with attached Injustice upgrades are dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Bound
triggers.text: The target gains an Aura (Binding) token.
